sections.description: Granular, transparent WordPress performance optimisation across core, scripts, fonts, preloading, database, images, WooCommerce and multisite — plus paste-in Critical CSS.
sections.changelog:
1.20.1

  • Update checks now served from GitHub for reliable delivery.
  • Consolidated self-hosted release; corrected update manifest.
sections.installation: Upload the plugin to /wp-content/plugins/, activate, and configure under MBR → Performance.
